close_reason: Added buck2.javascript configuration to flake-parts module. The infrastructure (jsdeps-gen, js-deps-cell.nix) can now build jsdeps cells. Note: TypeScript rules don't yet consume npm deps from jsdeps cell - needs separate enhancement.
description:
Add buck2.javascript configuration to flake-parts/turnkey matching go/rust/python pattern.

Infrastructure already exists:
- jsdeps-gen: parses pnpm-lock.yaml → js-deps.toml
- js-deps-cell.nix: builds jsdeps cell from js-deps.toml
- nix/lib/deps-cell/adapters/javascript.nix: adapter implementation

Need to add to nix/flake-parts/turnkey/default.nix:
- buck2.javascript.enable option
- buck2.javascript.depsFile option (path to js-deps.toml)
- buck2.javascript.lockFile option (pnpm-lock.yaml)
- jsdepsCell building logic
- Pass jsdepsCell to devenv shell config

Once this is done, typescript-hello-deps example can be added.
title: Add JavaScript dependency support to flake-parts module
